creator: pneumann@gmail.com
text:
The mailing list of bsd-sharp project has changed from 
  bsd-sharp-list@forge.novell.com
to 
  bsd-sharp@googlegroups.com

The following ports have the old address, and should be updated to the new one:

muine
gfax
mcatalog
tomboy
dbus-sharp
mono-tools
monodoc
bless
f-spot
mono
evolution-sharp
gmime2-sharp
avahi-sharp
blam
gecko-sharp10
gecko-sharp20
gnome-sharp20
gtk-sharp10
gtk-sharp20
gtksourceview-sharp
libgdiplus


Thanks!

Fix: 

Update Mainteinership.
